titleStmt.title: SII 25.147: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 147. (A.R. No. 147 of 1908.) KUḶḶAPUṞAM, PERIYAKULAM TALUK, MADURAI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Nīlakaṇṭhēśvara temple.
This record may palaeographically be assigned to the 13th Century.

It records an order of confirmation, evidently issued by the king in the above year. It is stated that Duvārāpati-vēḷār gave a piḍipāḍu to the dēvakaṉmis and the śivabrāhmaṇas of the temples of Tirumarudantuṟaiuḍaiyār and Irāja[rāja*]-Īśvaram-uḍaiyār at Rājachūḍāmaṇichchaturvēdimaṅgalam granting the dēvadāṉa lands of 1(1/2) mā-kāṇi, measured by Āṇmai-Aḻagiyāṉ-kōl, along with the income from several taxes (specified) as iṟaiyili to the god for the services including tiruppaḍimāṟṟu and for conducting a tīrtham festival in the month of Paṅguni on the day of the (king's) natal star Uttiraṭṭādi, to the deity Rājarāja-Īśvaram-uḍaiyār.
The document is stated to have been attested by Sēvagattēvaṉ Aṉavaratadāṉaṉ alias Māṉasēṉa-mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Īśaṉūr in Miḻalaikkūṟṟam and others.
The taxes specified are kaḍamai, antarāyam, puḷḷichchōṟu, pāḍikkāval, vaṇṇagakkūli and others known to the ūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Aruḷic ceyal . Irācacūṭāmaṇic caturvvedimaṅkalattut tirumarutantuṟai Uṭaiyārum Irā[jarāja*] Īśvara
muṭaiyārum koyilt tevakaṉmikkum civappirāmaṇaṟkum Iṉṉāyaṉmāṟku tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu vēṇṭum ni
mantaṅkaḷukkum Irā[ja*]rā[ja*] Īśvaramuṭaiyārkku nāmpiṟanta nāḷ Uttiraṭṭāti nāḷile tirttam piracātippatākak kaṇṭa paṅkuṉi ti
ru nāḷukku tirunāṭppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉavukkum tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṉṉāyaṉmāṟku Ivvūr tuvārapativeḷār Iṭṭa
Āṇmā Aḻakiyāṉ kolāl kārāṇmā Uṭpaṭat tevatāṉamāṉa nilam Oṉṟarai veliyum paṭāra ṇṭa nila mākkāṇiyum Āka
nilam Oṉṟaraiye mākāṇiyum kaṭamai Antarāyamum puḷḷiccoṟu pāṭikāvalum vaṇṇakkakkūliyum Ū ñca variyum maṟṟu mepperppaṭṭa
ṉavum Uṭppaṭap pattoṉpatāvatu mutal tuvārapati veḷār kuṭutta piṭipāṭṭiṉpaṭiye Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu Ivar
kaḷ coṉṉamaiyil Avar kuṭutta piṭipāṭṭiṉpaṭiye nāmum tantom . Ippaṭi kaik koṇṭu cantirātittavaṟ celvatākak kallilum cempilum ve
ṭṭivittuk koḷka . Ivai miḻalaik kūṟṟat tīcaṉūruṭaiyān cevakat tevaṉ Aṉavarat tāṉaṉāṉa māṉaceṉamuventa veḷāṉeḻuttu Ivai karuṅkuṭi nā
ṭṭuk ki māṉa virantivākara Āṉa
Digital edition of SII 25.147 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
